content: Install discovery deps (pysnmp/puresnmp, httpx) for SNMP + Netdisco REST
Backend: Discovery models (Credential, Job, DiscoveredDevice) + routers
Backend: SNMP scanner with fallback simulation + async job runner
Backend: Netdisco REST client + mapper to SMIFS models
Frontend: Discovery section in sidebar + Dashboard, Jobs, Discovered, Topology, Netdisco pages
Test the discovery flow end-to-end with testing agent
